title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at GKB Opticals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at GKB Opticals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the GKB Opticals family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About GKB Opticals:
GKB Opticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals!
